auth.label: Personal API Key
auth.description: Linear personal API key sent as the raw Authorization header value. Create or revoke it from Settings > Account > Security & Access.

actions.name: create_attachment
actions.description: Create or update an attachment for the specified Linear issue.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: create_comment_reaction
actions.description: Creates an emoji reaction for the specified Linear comment.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: create_linear_comment
actions.description: Creates a comment for the specified Linear issue.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: create_linear_issue
actions.description: Create a new Linear issue in the specified team and support fields such as project, person in charge, status, label, etc.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: create_linear_issue_relation
actions.description: Create a relationship between two Linear issues, such as blocks, related, or duplicate.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: create_linear_label
actions.description: Creates a new Linear issue label in the specified team.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: create_linear_project
actions.description: Create a new Linear project and associate one or more teams.

team_ids.description: Team IDs associated with the project.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: create_project_milestone
actions.description: Creates a project milestone for the specified Linear project.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: create_project_update
actions.description: Creates a project progress update for the specified Linear project.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: delete_linear_issue
actions.description: Delete the specified Linear issue.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: get_all_linear_teams
actions.description: Lists all Linear team basic information accessible with the current credentials.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: get_attachment
actions.description: Retrieve a Linear attachment based on the issue and attachment ID or file name.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Get the currently authenticated Linear user profile.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: get_cycles_by_team_id
actions.description: Get all cycle information under the specified team.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: get_issue_defaults
actions.description: Gets the default status and default estimate used when the specified team creates an issue.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: get_linear_issue
actions.description: Get details of a Linear issue, including comments, attachments, subscribers, and underlying relationship fields.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: get_linear_project
actions.description: Get the details of a Linear project, complete with team, members, and initiatives on demand.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: list_issue_drafts
actions.description: Lists issue drafts visible to the current user in Linear.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: list_issues_by_team_id
actions.description: List Linear issues by team, and support cursor paging and whether to include archived issues.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: list_linear_cycles
actions.description: Lists the Linear periods accessible by the current credential.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: list_linear_issues
actions.description: Lists Linear issues accessible with current credentials, and supports filtering by project and person in charge.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: list_linear_labels
actions.description: Lists Linear labels for a specified team or entire workspace.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: list_linear_projects
actions.description: Lists Linear projects accessible with the current credentials.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: list_linear_states
actions.description: Lists all workflow statuses for the specified team.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: list_linear_teams
actions.description: Lists Linear teams accessible with current credentials, along with a list of members and projects.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: list_linear_users
actions.description: List Linear users in the current workspace and support cursor paging.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: remove_issue_label
actions.description: Removes a label from the specified Linear issue.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: remove_reaction
actions.description: Delete an existing Linear reaction.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: run_mutation
actions.description: Perform a mutation directly on the Linear GraphQL API.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: run_query
actions.description: Execute a read-only query directly against the Linear GraphQL API.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: search_issues
actions.description: Retrieve issues through Linear's full-text search capabilities.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: update_issue
actions.description: Update an existing Linear issue and support fields such as title, description, status, project, label, etc.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: update_linear_comment
actions.description: Update the text of an existing Linear comment.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: update_linear_project
actions.description: Update an existing Linear project.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.
